field_values.action_summary: A warrior attempts to execute the wounded Watch-thing. The protagonist intervenes physically, striking the warrior to protect his beast. He then departs the building with Sola and his guardian, having secured allies.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-up on protagonist hand/strike against martian_warrior; Wide shot of group exiting into plaza; Tracking shot following protagonist and sola
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical mobility status of watch_thing (wounded state)
Lighting transition from martian_interior_chamber to exterior Martian light
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH006_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's protective nature through a physical confrontation with an aggressor. The sequence must transition from high-tension violence to a somber, resolved departure as the group exits the interior into the Martian plaza.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- martian_warrior
- watch_thing

## Required Environments
- martian_interior_chamber
- plaza

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical mobility status of watch_thing (wounded state)
- Lighting transition from martian_interior_chamber to exterior Martian light

## Beat List
- BT001: martian_warrior attempts to execute watch_thing
- BT002: protagonist strikes martian_warrior to protect beast
- BT003: group departs building for the plaza
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
